Rewards

Rewarding your Loyalty

Receive ILV as a token of appreciation for your continuous support and participation in the Illuvium universe.

Connect your Ethereum Wallet (L1)

Connect the Ethereum wallet you’ve used for past Illuvium engagements to view the Loyalty Reward you’ve earned, and collect your Reward.

Who's Eligible?

To be eligible for ILV rewards, you must have been an active participant within the Illuvium ecosystem in the past.

Staked ILV

If you've staked in our V1 or V2 protocols, you're in.

Land Owners

Your ownership of Illuvium Land secures your eligibility.

Beyond Collectors

Collectors of Illuvium’s Illuvitars and Accessories naturally qualify.

IlluviDEX Traders

Active asset trading on the IlluviDEX? You’re set.
